candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total row.
Duplicate total revenue row with identical values; useful only as fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: Used revenue priority list because both labels appear and represent the same top-line item.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; sits between revenue and overhead items.

variables.notes: Selected the direct cost line rather than any operating expense subtotal.

candidates.why: Personnel/overhead component appropriate for SG&A.
Generic operating overhead bucket appropriate for SG&A.
Headcount metric, not an expense line; not suitable for SG&A.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A total row is present. Chose the best overhead components and excluded COGS, D&A, and totals/subtotals.
No dedicated research/development expense line appears on the Income Statement preview.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if a dedicated interest expense line is unavailable in some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Dedicated interest expense line and best conceptual match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component, narrower than total interest expense.
Non-interest finance expense bucket; weaker match.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental component only; not preferred for main XINT mapping.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the dedicated interest expense line first, with broader financial expenses as fallback if reporting changes.

candidates.why: Only one equity component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Best match because it captures parent shareholders' equity and excludes non-controlling interests.
Includes non-controlling interests, so inferior when parent-only equity is available.
Balancing row, not an accounting line to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total liabilities plus equity, not book equity.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the shareholders of the parent

variables.notes: Chose parent equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of earnings to NCI, not balance sheet stock measure.
Balance sheet non-controlling interest line; best match for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet NCI label; useful fallback if label changes.
Income statement profit allocation, not book minority interest.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income attribution, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Used balance sheet NCI labels only; excluded income statement attribution rows.
